etymology.description: 立(立) (lì, "to stand") + 矣(矣) (yi, phonetic) = concept of standing still, waiting
etymology.interpretation: The character 竢(竢) (zhú, "wait") represents the idea of waiting through the concept of standing still, with 立(立) (lì, "to stand") providing the semantic sense and 矣(矣) (yi) contributing phonetic value.
